automation/webhooks.title: Webhooks
automation/webhooks.description: Send signed AgencyAccess lifecycle events to your CRM, automation stack, or internal systems.

client-experience/agency-branding-basics.title: Agency Branding Basics
client-experience/agency-branding-basics.description: Keep the client authorization flow on-brand without delaying onboarding or over-customizing the first request.

client-experience/supported-platforms.title: Supported Platforms Overview
client-experience/supported-platforms.description: Review the major platforms AuthHub supports today and know when to send clients to a platform-specific guide instead of generic support copy.

client-experience/what-clients-see.title: What Clients See
client-experience/what-clients-see.description: Understand the customer-facing AuthHub flow so your agency can set expectations before a client opens the authorization link.

getting-started/create-your-first-reques.title: Create Your First Request
getting-started/create-your-first-reques.description: Launch your first AuthHub client authorization request in minutes and focus on the minimum setup needed for activation.

index.title: AuthHub Help Center
index.description: Learn how to create client requests, send secure authorization links, troubleshoot blockers, and manage access with confidence.

requests-and-links/check-request-status.title: Check Request Status
requests-and-links/check-request-status.description: Use AuthHub request status to understand whether a client has opened, started, completed, or stalled a platform authorization flow.

requests-and-links/resend-or-revoke.title: Resend or Revoke a Request
requests-and-links/resend-or-revoke.description: Decide when to resend an AuthHub request versus revoking it and creating a clean replacement for the client.

requests-and-links/send-your-link.title: Send Your Link
requests-and-links/send-your-link.description: Share an AuthHub request link with the right client contact and reduce the back-and-forth that slows onboarding.

security-and-compliance/audit-logs-and-s.title: Audit Logs and Security
security-and-compliance/audit-logs-and-s.description: Understand how AuthHub handles client authorization activity, audit visibility, and the security expectations around platform access workflows.

security-and-compliance/request-expirati.title: Request Expiration Behavior
security-and-compliance/request-expirati.description: Learn how expiration affects access requests, how to recover from expired links, and how to keep agency workflows from stalling.

security-and-compliance/team-and-account.title: Team and Account Basics
security-and-compliance/team-and-account.description: Set expectations for how agency members should work inside AuthHub so access workflows stay attributable and operationally clean.

troubleshooting/client-auth-issues.title: Fix Client Authorization Issues
troubleshooting/client-auth-issues.description: Troubleshoot cases where a client starts the flow but cannot finish due to platform errors, permission gaps, or expired request state.

troubleshooting/common-client-blockers.title: Common Client Blockers
troubleshooting/common-client-blockers.description: Diagnose the most frequent reasons a client request stalls and decide whether the fix is education, a different contact, or a replacement request.
